commands_run: bash scripts/agent-coord.sh claim form-native-elf-docker-runner "close runner gap: execute Form-native Android/aarch64 ELF under Docker Linux/arm64 and record stdout/stderr/exit receipt"
failure_reason: Closed the Form-native ELF executable runner gap on this host. Docker Desktop was started and Docker Linux/arm64 reported aarch64; the audit now falls back from qemu-aarch64 to Docker when the daemon is live and the image is present or pull is explicitly enabled. The Form-emitted ELF64/aarch64 ET_EXEC image still passes the focused 63 four-way proof, file(1) reports an ARM aarch64 ELF executable, and Docker Linux/arm64 runs it with stdout FORM ELF, empty stderr, and exit 42. Android device/emulator execution remains a separate target-specific receipt.

commands: bash scripts/agent-coord.sh claim form-native-elf-docker-runner "close runner gap: execute Form-native Android/aarch64 ELF under Docker Linux/arm64 and record stdout/stderr/exit receipt"
